Create personalized conversation starters instantly.

Follow-Up Automation

Generate personalized follow-up emails and action items in seconds.

Create highly personalized outbound messages at scale.

Deal Risk Predictor

Identify at-risk deals before they impact pipeline performance.

Relationship Intelligence

Map stakeholder relationships and influence across accounts.

Pipeline Analytics

Track pipeline health, conversion trends, and revenue performance.

Revenue Intelligence

Forecast revenue and uncover next-best actions using AI.

Close deals faster with automated prep and follow-up.

Scale winning behaviors and gain pipeline visibility.

"Sales Saathi effectively replaced two point-solutions in our stack. The Pro plan paid for itself in week one just by recovering 4 hours of admin time per rep."

Frequently Asked Questions

Yes. Both Pro and Team plans come with a full-featured 14-day free trial. No credit card is required to start, and you will have unlimited access to all AI features to evaluate the platform thoroughly before committing.
We currently offer bi-directional native integrations with Salesforce, HubSpot, and Zoho CRM. For other platforms, we provide a robust REST API and webhook infrastructure on our Team and Enterprise tiers to facilitate custom data pipelines.
Monthly plans can be canceled at any time from your billing dashboard with zero penalty, effectively ending your subscription at the current billing cycle. Annual plans represent a 12-month commitment allowing you to lock in the 20% discount rate.
We operate on a zero-retention policy for CRM payload data during model inference. Data is encrypted in transit (TLS 1.3) and at rest (AES-256). We are fully SOC2 Type II compliant and GDPR ready. Sales Saathi does not train public LLMs on your proprietary deal data.
Yes. On the Enterprise tier, our AI engineering team works with your RevOps department to fine-tune isolated, single-tenant AI models using your historical sales transcripts, ensuring the AI outputs match your exact organizational tone and MEDDIC methodologies.

Ready to automate your pipeline?

Join over 4,500 forward-thinking sales teams utilizing Sales Saathi to close deals faster and eliminate administrative overhead.
